name: @othmanadi/loophole-core
description: Loophole core: the SDK-free, CI-tested heart shared by the Loophole Bridge and the Loophole Kit extensions. The LiveBridge port, FakeLiveBridge model, DTOs, path ids, error model, and pure note transforms.
author: Ahmad Othman Ammar Adi (CodingWithAdi)
